product.name: Merries First Premium Pants Diaper - L (9-14kg)

product.description: This product is transitioning to a new packaging. Design may varies depending on stock availability.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Moony has super-slim absorber that absorbs up to 12 hours of urine and has special "soft-stretch" material that fits the body well as your baby moves!

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Japan

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• To wear:
1. Put on like pants (roll up tape is to be at the back)
2. Leg gathers and waistband must be fitted, not folded over
• To dispose:
1. Tear off side seams
2. Roll up diaper from crotch to waistband
3. Pull up tape that is attached on back sheet
4. Attach roll up tape on diaper
5. Dispose stool in toilet
6. Do not flush used diapers in toilet
7. To prevent rashes, clean and change diaper immediately upon soiling

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
• Top Sheet: Non Woven Polyolefin, Polyster
• Absorbent Pad: Pulp, Polymer, Non Woven Polyolefin
• Back Sheet: Film Polyolefin
• Tape: Polyolefin
• Elastic: Non Woven Polyolefin, Polyester, Film Styrene Elastomer
• Construction: Styrene Elastomer Synthetic Resin

product.name: MamyPoko Air Fit Boy Pants - L (9 - 14kg)

offers.description: Buy 1 MamyPoko Air Fit Boy Pants - L (9 - 14kg) @ $102.00

categoryDataMapping.name: $12 off Kimberly Clark x Reckitt x J&J
$12 off Kimberly Clark x Johnson x Reckitt

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Made from softest materials to embrace baby in total comfort
• Light and breathable that allows fresh air to pass through
• Slim fit without bunching and bulkiness after multiple wetting
• 3D leak lock liner to lock liquid quickly for ultimate dryness
• 12 hours overnight absorbency, a 5 layer super absorbent structure which absorbs urine fast up to 12 hours

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: China

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• To wear:
1. Before putting on the diaper, take the elastic waistband found at the back and lightly stretch it out, ensuring the folds are not scrunched up
2. Once the diaper is wrapped around, there is no need to leave space between the diaper and baby's tummy
3. Ensure that the flaps around the thighs are folded outwards for the best leakage protection
• Caution:
1. Please dispose used diapers in trash can
2. To avoid risk of suffocation, keep plastic away from babies and children

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a dry and cool place, away from direct sunlight

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Pulp, Super Absorbent Polymer, Polyethylene Non-Woven Back-Sheet, Non-Woven Top Sheet, Synthetic Elastic Material, Hot Melt Adhesive For Construction
